title: 00Z controlled confirmation report schema
description: Boundary-test artifact only. effective_confirmation=true is scoped exclusively to validation/reports controlled write testing. not_project_authorization=true and production_scope=false mean this is never a productive project authorization.

effective_confirmation.description: True only for controlled report-boundary test semantics; never authorizes project mutation.

not_project_authorization.description: Must remain true; this report is not a productive project authorization.

production_scope.description: Must remain false; boundary-test scope only.
